_authoring_notes: Section 5 — Spring 2026 Dallas recap + 3-photo strip. REFACTORED 2026-04-26 to Option B.
Outer Elementor container is boxed (1100px); the .fsi-section-muted div in the HTML widget provides the muted bg/styling.
3-photo strip uses .fsi-photo-strip with 3 .fsi-photo-strip__item children, each with .fsi-img-placeholder + caption. CSS handles the responsive columns.

settings.html:
Spring 2026 | Dallas, Texas

The most recent Legal League Servicer Summit convened March 25-26, 2026 in Dallas, bringing together member firms, servicer legal and default operations teams, and industry stakeholders for two days of programming covering case law, regulatory policy, and the operational issues shaping the 2026 servicing landscape.

The 2026 Summit marked the last Dallas edition before the Summit's 2027 move to Washington D.C. in conjunction with Government Forum Week.
